channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: LAPD Gang Unit Officers Investigated for Not Using Body Cameras During Traffic Stops
item.description: At least eight officers from the Los Angeles Police Department's 77th Street Division anti-gang unit are under internal investigation for failing to activate body-worn cameras and conducting traffic s...

item.title: Ramp explores $40 billion valuation after rapid growth and AI integration
item.description: Ramp, the corporate spend management startup, is reportedly in discussions to raise an additional $750 million at a pre-money valuation exceeding $40 billion, just six months after reaching a $32 bill...

item.title: Review: The Sheep Detectives – A whimsical murder mystery with talking sheep
item.description: The Sheep Detectives is a whimsical family-friendly murder mystery that combines live-action performances with computer-generated talking sheep. Starring Hugh Jackman as a devoted shepherd, Emma Thomp...

item.title: Sara Duterte urges Romualdez and Co to clarify allegations on flood control projects
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has called on former House Speaker Martin Romualdez and former lawmaker Zaldy Co to be transparent about allegations involving controversial flood control projects. Speakin...

item.title: Nigerian Police release official contacts for reporting misconduct and unnamed officers
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force don remind Nigerians say dem get official ways to report any harassment, extortion, intimidation, or misconduct wey police officers dey commit. Dis reminder come through a pub...

item.title: RCMP Faces Safety Risks Due to Delays in Firearm and Equipment Procurement
item.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) is facing significant delays in replacing its outdated sidearms, exposing front-line officers to potential safety risks. The current pistols, issued in 1995, w...

item.title: Westlife to Perform in Manila as Part of 2027 Anniversary Tour
item.description: Irish pop group Westlife is set to return to Manila as part of their 2027 anniversary world tour. Fans of the band can look forward to seeing them perform live at the SM Mall of Asia Arena, one of the...

item.title: Labour suffers heavy losses to Reform UK in 2026 local elections
item.description: In the 2026 UK local elections, Reform UK achieved significant gains, marking a historic night for Nigel Farage's party and a troubling setback for Labour under Sir Keir Starmer. Reform UK won nearly ...

item.title: Scientists Trace Key Microbes That Could Explain Origins of Complex Life on Earth
item.description: Researchers have made an exciting discovery on the shores of Gathaagudu, better known as Shark Bay, on Australia's west coast. The site is home to stromatolites and microbial mats, living fossils of e...

item.title: BQueen’s Journey from Retail Work to Music Success with Bongani Fassie
item.description: BQueen, born Busisiwe Sigenu, is a rising bacardi musician from Daveyton, Ekurhuleni, who has recently gained attention in South Africa’s music scene. Before venturing into music, she spent many years...

item.title: Three Hikers Dead and Ten Missing After Mount Dukono Eruption in Indonesia
item.description: Three hikers, including two foreigners, lost their lives while ten others remain missing following the eruption of Mount Dukono on Halmahera Island, Indonesia. The volcano spewed ash roughly ten kilom...

item.title: B.C. government to rebuild Tumbler Ridge Secondary School on a new site after February shooting
item.description: The B.C. government has announced plans to demolish and rebuild Tumbler Ridge Secondary School following a tragic mass shooting in February that claimed eight lives, including five students and an edu...

item.title: Press Freedom Concerns: State Governors and Officials Under Scrutiny for Media Attacks
item.description: During the 2026 World Press Freedom Day workshop held for journalists in Abuja, discussion centre well well on how state governors and officials dey attack press freedom for Nigeria. Isa Sanusi, Amnes...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Disburses Funds to Support Vulnerable Households
item.description: The Zanzibar government has successfully disbursed Sh1.75 billion to 27,886 poor households in both Unguja and Pemba, as part of its ongoing commitment to reduce poverty across the islands. Second Vic...

item.title: Oga Obinna shares his mother’s concerns about his relationship with Miss P
item.description: Media personality Oga Obinna has opened up about a personal matter involving his alleged relationship with singer Miss P, revealing that his mother is not fully supportive of it. Speaking during a liv...

item.title: DOST Secretary Renato Solidum Tops 2025 Cabinet Salary Report
item.description: The Commission on Audit (COA) has released its 2025 Report on Salaries and Allowances (ROSA), revealing that Department of Science and Technology (DOST) Secretary Renato Solidum Jr. remains the highes...

item.title: Federal High Court Set To Hear Case On Goodluck Jonathan’s Eligibility For 2027 Election
item.description: A Federal High Court for Abuja don schedule to hear one suit wey wan stop former President Goodluck Jonathan from entering the 2027 presidential election. The case na Johnmary Jideobi, one lawyer, bri...

item.title: Three Police Officers Killed in Kariega Home Shooting by Ex-Partner
item.description: In a tragic incident in Kariega, Eastern Cape, three police officers lost their lives following a late-night shooting at a private residence on Rudman Street. The suspect, a male constable, forced his...

item.title: Malibongwe Mdwaba says goodbye to Shongwe Radebe on Skeem Saam after a challenging season
item.description: Actor Malibongwe Mdwaba has officially announced his departure from SABC 1’s long-running soapie 'Skeem Saam', where he portrayed the complex character Shongwe Radebe. Taking to Instagram, Mdwaba shar...

item.title: Tanzanian High Court denies Standard Chartered extra time to appeal IPTL ruling
item.description: Arusha. The High Court of Tanzania, Commercial Division, has turned down a request from Standard Chartered Bank Hong Kong Limited and Standard Chartered Bank Malaysia Berhad to get more time to file a...
